name: TestJoinFrPOCState
title: TestJoinFrPOCState
syntax: long TestJoinFrPOCState (dword aPOCState, dword aWUState) // form 3
description: Completes the current set of "joined events" with the transmitted event.

parameters.name: aPOCState
parameters.description: The POC state the function will wait for (see selector 'FR_POCState' in event procedure on FrPOCState). If set to '-1' in combination with a 'WUState' the function will wait only for a Wakeup state (any POC state will be accepted). Available from CANoe 7.2.

parameters.name: aWUState
parameters.description: The Wakeup state the function will wait for (see selector 'FR_Info2' in event procedure on FrPOCState). Available from CANoe 7.2.

return: The POC state the function will wait

description: For an example see function TestWaitForFrPOCState.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
